title: The Franky Family’s Attack
description: Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.
scene: Across pages 3, 4, 5, 6, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: On the streets of water seven

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: About what happened in Zougen- Jima*!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shipping entrance to the first dock

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Guess they can't sleep... or something......

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I thought maybe..... Nico Robin-chan would come back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Iceburgsan was shot in his house!!?

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Hey! Calm down and listen to me!!!

summary: Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.
